headline: Waist-to-chest SSE windswell with a clean offshore morning — get it early.
today: Best window is dawn through late morning while the NNW stays offshore and the swell holds around 3ft at 6s. It's only a fair angle so expect some closeouts, but it's the biggest, cleanest look you'll get for a while. Grab a fish or groveler and ride the incoming toward the 3:55p high. Evening SE goes cross-on and wrecks it.

daysToWatch.note: Biggest of the stretch at 3-4ft and strong N offshore all morning. Fair angle and short period so it'll be a bit lumpy, but size plus clean wind makes it the one to rearrange for.
